401.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim al-Nakha'i that he saw no harm in a menstruating woman performing ablution for a sick person.
401.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim al-Nakha'i bahwa dia tidak melihat masalah jika seorang wanita yang sedang haid melakukan wudhu untuk orang yang sakit.

402.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to wash the head of the Prophet ﷺ while I was menstruating.'
402.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku biasa mencuci kepala Nabi ﷺ sementara aku sedang haid.'

403.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to wash the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while I was menstruating and he was in i'tikaf.'
403.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku biasa mencuci kepala Rasulullah ﷺ sementara aku sedang haid dan beliau sedang i'tikaf.'

404.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mughirah that Abu Zubyan sent a message to Ibrahim asking about whether a menstruating woman can perform ablution for a sick person. Ibrahim said: 'Yes, and she may also support him.' The narrator asked Mughirah about it further, and this ruling was confirmed.
404.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mughirah bahwa Abu Zubyan mengirim pesan kepada Ibrahim bertanya tentang apakah wanita yang sedang haid boleh melakukan wudhu untuk orang sakit. Ibrahim berkata: 'Ya, dan dia juga boleh menopangnya.' Perawi bertanya lebih lanjut kepada Mughirah tentang itu, dan hukum ini dikonfirmasi.

405.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding impurity in her hand while menstruating: 'It is not in your hand' — meaning the hand is not considered impure by menstruation.
405.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda mengenai najis di tangannya saat haid: 'Itu bukan di tanganmu' — artinya tangan tidak dianggap najis karena haid.

406.iwh_en: It was narrated that a scholar was asked whether a menstruating woman may perform ablution for a sick person and he said: 'Yes.'
406.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang ulama ditanya apakah wanita yang sedang haid boleh melakukan wudhu untuk orang sakit dan dia berkata: 'Ya.'

407.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Prophet ﷺ about eating with a menstruating woman. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Eat with her.'
407.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang Sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang makan bersama wanita yang sedang haid. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Makanlah bersamanya.'

408.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he used to instruct his slave girl to hand him water for ablution even when she was menstruating — indicating he saw no issue with accepting things from a menstruating woman.
408.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia biasa menginstruksikan budak perempuannya untuk memberikan air wudhu kepadanya meskipun dia sedang haid — menunjukkan dia tidak melihat masalah dalam menerima sesuatu dari wanita yang sedang haid.

409.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion that he asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about eating with a menstruating woman. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Some of my family are menstruating, yet we eat and drink together' — indicating that eating and drinking with a menstruating woman is permissible.
409.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang Sahabat bahwa dia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang makan bersama wanita yang sedang haid. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebagian dari keluargaku sedang haid, namun kami makan dan minum bersama' — menunjukkan bahwa makan dan minum bersama wanita yang sedang haid adalah diperbolehkan.

410.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she saw no problem with a menstruating woman handing water or other things to a person who needed them.
410.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dia tidak melihat masalah jika wanita yang sedang haid memberikan air atau benda lain kepada seseorang yang membutuhkannya.

411.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim al-Nakha'i, al-Hasan al-Basri, and Ata that they all held there is no problem with a menstruating woman handling items or performing tasks for others.
411.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim al-Nakha'i, al-Hasan al-Bashri, dan Atha bahwa mereka semua berpendapat tidak ada masalah jika wanita yang sedang haid menangani benda atau melakukan tugas untuk orang lain.

412.iwh_en: It was narrated that Sufyan was asked: 'May a man have intercourse with his wife when the blood has stopped but before she has performed ghusl?' He said: 'No.' He was asked: 'What if she has not performed ghusl for two days or more?' He maintained his position that she must perform ghusl first.
412.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Sufyan ditanya: 'Bolehkah seorang pria berhubungan intim dengan istrinya ketika darah telah berhenti tetapi sebelum dia mandi?' Dia berkata: 'Tidak.' Ditanya: 'Bagaimana jika dia belum mandi selama dua hari atau lebih?' Dia mempertahankan posisinya bahwa dia harus mandi terlebih dahulu.

413.iwh_en: It was narrated that Sufyan said regarding the Quranic verse 'when they have purified themselves': 'When the blood has stopped.' He commented on the verse — 'when they have cleansed themselves' — saying: 'When they have performed ghusl.'
413.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Sufyan berkata mengenai ayat Quran 'apabila mereka telah bersuci': 'Ketika darah telah berhenti.' Dia mengomentari ayat — 'apabila mereka telah membersihkan diri' — sambil berkata: 'Ketika mereka telah mandi.'

414.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sufyan regarding the verse: 'When the blood has stopped — "when they have purified themselves"' means when they have performed ghusl.
414.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sufyan mengenai ayat: 'Ketika darah telah berhenti — "apabila mereka telah bersuci"' berarti ketika mereka telah mandi.

415.iwh_en: It was narrated that Mujahid was asked about a woman who has seen the signs of purity: 'May her husband approach her before she performs ghusl?' He said: 'No, not until prayer becomes permissible for her' — meaning she must perform ghusl first.
415.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Mujahid ditanya tentang seorang wanita yang telah melihat tanda-tanda kesucian: 'Bolehkah suaminya mendatanginya sebelum dia mandi?' Dia berkata: 'Tidak, tidak sampai shalat menjadi halal baginya' — artinya dia harus mandi terlebih dahulu.

416.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ata, Maymun ibn Mihran, and Ibrahim al-Nakha'i that they all said: 'He should not cover her until she has performed ghusl.'
416.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Atha, Maimun ibn Mihran, dan Ibrahim al-Nakha'i bahwa mereka semua berkata: 'Dia tidak boleh menggaulinya sampai dia telah mandi.'

417.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan that he said: 'She is considered menstruating as long as she has not performed ghusl, and he must pay expiation. He may take her back as long as she has not performed ghusl.'
417.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan bahwa dia berkata: 'Dia dianggap sedang haid selama dia belum mandi, dan dia harus membayar kafarat. Dia boleh merujuknya selama dia belum mandi.'

418.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar that he said: 'Her husband should not cover her' — before she has performed the ghusl from menstruation.
418.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama bahwa dia berkata: 'Suaminya tidak boleh menggaulinya' — sebelum dia melakukan mandi dari haid.

419.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uqbah ibn Amir al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) who reported a saying regarding the obligation to perform ghusl before intercourse after menstruation stops.
419.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Uqbah ibn Amir al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) yang melaporkan perkataan mengenai kewajiban mandi sebelum berhubungan intim setelah haid berhenti.

420.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar that he said: 'No, not until she has performed ghusl' — in response to whether a husband may approach his wife before her post-menstrual ghusl.
420.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama bahwa dia berkata: 'Tidak, tidak sampai dia telah mandi' — sebagai jawaban atas apakah seorang suami boleh mendatangi istrinya sebelum mandi pasca-haid.

421.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar who gave a concession, saying: 'If he has an overwhelming desire, she should wash her private parts and then he may approach her' — before completing the full ghusl.
421.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama yang memberikan keringanan, berkata: 'Jika dia memiliki keinginan yang sangat kuat, dia harus mencuci kemaluannya kemudian dia boleh mendatanginya' — sebelum menyelesaikan mandi penuh.

422.iwh_en: It was narrated that Sharik was asked by a man: 'When a woman's blood has stopped — may her husband approach her before she performs ghusl?' Sharik transmitted from Abd al-Malik from Ata that she must perform ghusl first.
422.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Syarik ditanya oleh seorang pria: 'Ketika darah seorang wanita telah berhenti — bolehkah suaminya mendatanginya sebelum dia mandi?' Syarik menyampaikan dari Abd al-Malik dari Atha bahwa dia harus mandi terlebih dahulu.

423.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan that he said: 'I saw women from Medina praying while wearing henna dye' — indicating that wearing henna does not invalidate ablution or prayer.
423.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku melihat wanita-wanita dari Madinah shalat sambil memakai henna' — menunjukkan bahwa memakai henna tidak membatalkan wudhu atau shalat.

424.iwh_en: It was narrated from a woman who was asked about praying with henna that she said: 'I would rather have my hands cut off with knives than do that' — expressing strong disapproval of applying henna in a way that would prevent water from reaching the skin during ablution.
424.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang wanita yang ditanya tentang shalat dengan henna bahwa dia berkata: 'Aku lebih suka tanganku dipotong dengan pisau daripada melakukan itu' — mengungkapkan penolakan keras terhadap mengoleskan henna dengan cara yang mencegah air mencapai kulit saat wudhu.

425.iwh_en: It was narrated that a woman said regarding henna: 'Wash it off' — indicating that henna must be removed if it creates a barrier preventing water from reaching the skin during ablution.
425.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang wanita berkata mengenai henna: 'Cucilah' — menunjukkan bahwa henna harus dihapus jika menciptakan penghalang yang mencegah air mencapai kulit saat wudhu.

426.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said: 'Our women used to apply henna at night. When they woke up, they would remove it, perform ablution, and pray. Then they would apply henna again after the prayer. When Dhuhr was near, they would remove it, perform ablution, and pray.'
426.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia berkata: 'Wanita-wanita kami biasa mengoleskan henna di malam hari. Ketika bangun, mereka melepasnya, berwudhu, dan shalat. Kemudian mereka mengoleskan henna lagi setelah shalat. Ketika Zuhur mendekat, mereka melepasnya, berwudhu, dan shalat.'

427.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nafi' that the wives of Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) used to apply henna even while they were menstruating.
427.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nafi' bahwa istri-istri Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa mengoleskan henna bahkan saat mereka sedang haid.

428.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said: 'Our women, when they had prayed the Isha prayer, would apply henna. When morning came, they would remove it, perform ablution, and pray. When they had prayed Dhuhr, they would apply henna again, and when they wanted to pray Asr, they would remove it.' This indicates flexibility in the use of henna between prayers.
428.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia berkata: 'Wanita-wanita kami, ketika telah shalat Isya, mengoleskan henna. Ketika pagi tiba, mereka melepasnya, berwudhu, dan shalat. Ketika telah shalat Zuhur, mereka mengoleskan henna lagi, dan ketika ingin shalat Ashar, mereka melepasnya.' Ini menunjukkan fleksibilitas dalam penggunaan henna di antara shalat.

429.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibrahim al-Nakha'i and al-Sha'bi regarding the expiation for one who has intercourse with his wife while she is menstruating. The scholars differed: some said expiation is required, some said only seeking forgiveness is needed.
429.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibrahim al-Nakha'i dan al-Sya'bi mengenai kafarat bagi orang yang berhubungan intim dengan istrinya saat dia sedang haid. Para ulama berbeda pendapat: sebagian berkata kafarat diperlukan, sebagian berkata hanya meminta ampunan yang diperlukan.

430.iwh_en: It was narrated that a scholar said: 'It is a sin he has committed, but there is no expiation upon him' — regarding intercourse during menstruation.
430.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang ulama berkata: 'Itu adalah dosa yang telah dia lakukan, tetapi tidak ada kafarat atasnya' — mengenai hubungan intim saat haid.

431.iwh_en: It was narrated that a scholar said: 'He should seek excuse from Allah and repent to Allah' — regarding one who has intercourse with his menstruating wife.
431.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang ulama berkata: 'Dia harus meminta maaf kepada Allah dan bertaubat kepada Allah' — mengenai orang yang berhubungan intim dengan istri yang sedang haid.

432.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sufyan al-Thawri that he said: 'He should seek forgiveness from Allah, and there is nothing else upon him' — meaning no monetary expiation is required for intercourse during menstruation.
432.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sufyan al-Tsauri bahwa dia berkata: 'Dia harus memohon ampunan kepada Allah, dan tidak ada lagi yang wajib atasnya' — artinya tidak diperlukan kafarat uang untuk hubungan intim saat haid.

433.iwh_en: It was narrated that a scholar was asked — and the narrator heard this — about a man who approaches his wife while she is menstruating. He said: 'He should seek forgiveness from Allah.'
433.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang ulama ditanya — dan perawi mendengar ini — tentang seorang pria yang mendatangi istrinya saat dia sedang haid. Dia berkata: 'Dia harus memohon ampunan kepada Allah.'

434.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man came to Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him) and said: 'I saw in a dream as if I was urinating blood.' He said: 'Are you having intercourse with your wife while she is menstruating?' He said: 'Yes.' He said: 'Fear Allah and do not do it again.'
434.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang pria datang kepada Abu Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dan berkata: 'Aku melihat dalam mimpi seolah-olah aku kencing darah.' Dia berkata: 'Apakah kamu berhubungan intim dengan istrimu saat dia sedang haid?' Dia berkata: 'Ya.' Dia berkata: 'Takutlah kepada Allah dan jangan lakukan lagi.'

435.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sufyan al-Thawri that he said: 'He should seek forgiveness from Allah' — regarding one who has intercourse with his menstruating wife.
435.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sufyan al-Tsauri bahwa dia berkata: 'Dia harus memohon ampunan kepada Allah' — mengenai orang yang berhubungan intim dengan istri yang sedang haid.

436.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan regarding one who breaks his fast intentionally in Ramadan: 'He must free a slave, or give a large animal for sacrifice, or give twenty sa' to forty poor people.' Regarding one who covers his menstruating wife: 'He must give in charity' — indicating the two expiations are similar.
436.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan mengenai orang yang sengaja membatalkan puasanya di bulan Ramadan: 'Dia harus memerdekakan budak, atau memberikan hewan besar untuk kurban, atau memberikan dua puluh sha' kepada empat puluh orang miskin.' Mengenai orang yang menggauli istri yang sedang haid: 'Dia harus bersedekah' — menunjukkan bahwa dua kafarat itu serupa.

437.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding one who has intercourse with his menstruating wife: 'He should give half a dinar in charity.'
437.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda mengenai orang yang berhubungan intim dengan istri yang sedang haid: 'Dia harus bersedekah setengah dinar.'

438.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'He should give one dinar or half a dinar in charity.' Al-Hakam had doubt about whether it was one or half.
438.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Dia harus bersedekah satu dinar atau setengah dinar.' Al-Hakam ragu apakah itu satu atau setengah.

439.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that a scholar said: 'By Allah, I would not wish to have lived in the world as long as Noah and then narrated this — or stayed silent about it' — indicating hesitation about transmitting the hadith on expiation for intercourse during menstruation.
439.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa seorang ulama berkata: 'Demi Allah, aku tidak ingin hidup di dunia selama Nuh kemudian meriwayatkan ini — atau diam tentang itu' — menunjukkan keraguan tentang menyampaikan hadits tentang kafarat hubungan intim saat haid.

440.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said: 'If he approaches her while she is actively bleeding, he should give one dinar. If he approaches her after the blood has stopped (but before ghusl), he should give half a dinar.'
440.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia berkata: 'Jika dia mendatanginya saat dia masih aktif berdarah, dia harus memberikan satu dinar. Jika dia mendatanginya setelah darah berhenti (tetapi sebelum mandi), dia harus memberikan setengah dinar.'

441.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding one who has intercourse with his wife while she is menstruating: 'He should give half a dinar in charity.'
441.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda mengenai orang yang berhubungan intim dengan istrinya saat dia sedang haid: 'Dia harus bersedekah setengah dinar.'

442.iwh_en: It was narrated from a relative of Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) that Umar had a wife who disliked intercourse. When he wanted to come to her, she would make excuses claiming to be menstruating. He came to her anyway, and found she was telling the truth. He paid expiation for this.
442.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari kerabat Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Umar memiliki istri yang tidak menyukai hubungan intim. Ketika dia ingin mendatanginya, dia selalu beralasan sedang haid. Dia tetap mendatanginya, dan mendapati dia jujur. Dia membayar kafarat atas hal ini.

443.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said: 'If a man approaches his wife while she is menstruating: if the blood is fresh red, he should give one dinar in charity. If it is a yellowish discharge, he should give half a dinar.'
443.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia berkata: 'Jika seorang pria mendatangi istrinya saat dia sedang haid: jika darahnya merah segar, dia harus bersedekah satu dinar. Jika itu keluaran kekuningan, dia harus bersedekah setengah dinar.'

444.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said: 'He should give one dinar or half a dinar in charity.' Ibrahim al-Nakha'i said: 'He should seek forgiveness from Allah.'
444.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia berkata: 'Dia harus bersedekah satu dinar atau setengah dinar.' Ibrahim al-Nakha'i berkata: 'Dia harus memohon ampunan kepada Allah.'

445.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said: 'If he has intercourse with his wife while she is menstruating, he must give one dinar in charity.'
445.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia berkata: 'Jika dia berhubungan intim dengan istrinya saat dia sedang haid, dia harus bersedekah satu dinar.'

446.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar that he said: 'He should give one dinar in charity' — regarding intercourse during menstruation.
446.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama bahwa dia berkata: 'Dia harus bersedekah satu dinar' — mengenai hubungan intim saat haid.

447.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said regarding intercourse during menstruation: 'He should give one dinar or half a dinar in charity.'
447.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia berkata mengenai hubungan intim saat haid: 'Dia harus bersedekah satu dinar atau setengah dinar.'

448.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar that he said: 'He should seek forgiveness from Allah and give two-fifths of a dinar in charity' — regarding intercourse during menstruation.
448.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama bahwa dia berkata: 'Dia harus memohon ampunan kepada Allah dan bersedekah dua perlima dinar' — mengenai hubungan intim saat haid.

449.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar that he said: 'If a man has intercourse with his wife while she is menstruating, he should give half a dinar in charity.' A man from the people said to him: 'Al-Hasan says he must free a slave.' The scholar replied: 'I do not know this from al-Hasan.'
449.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama bahwa dia berkata: 'Jika seorang pria berhubungan intim dengan istrinya saat dia sedang haid, dia harus bersedekah setengah dinar.' Seorang pria dari orang-orang berkata kepadanya: 'Al-Hasan berkata dia harus memerdekakan budak.' Ulama itu menjawab: 'Aku tidak tahu ini dari al-Hasan.'

450.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said regarding intercourse during menstruation: 'He should give one dinar in charity.'
450.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa dia berkata mengenai hubungan intim saat haid: 'Dia harus bersedekah satu dinar.'
